rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, AUGUST 8, 2006. PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, TO APPT. ARBITRATOR, AND FOR ORDERS IN AID OF ARBITRATION, REQUEST FOR MAMDATORY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED.
